explanation: Dice, Board, Cards, and Pawns are all common physical components found in traditional, analog board games. A 'Screen' is not typically a component of a physical board game, being more associated with digital gaming or display technology.

All tokens are from the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World. However, the Great Pyramid of Giza is the only one that remains largely intact and standing today; the other four have been destroyed over time.

All words except 'Storm' form a new, common English word when their first letter is removed (Smile -> mile, Chair -> hair, Plate -> late, Clean -> lean). 'Storm' becomes 'torm', which is not a recognized English word.
